task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the Rancher UI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Rancher dashboard interface loaded in a web browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'old-project' namespace has been successfully deleted by removing its finalizers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rancher UI Namespaces list (or via 'kubectl get ns' in terminal), the 'old-project' namespace is no longer listed or visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'data-vol' PersistentVolumeClaim in the 'staging' namespace has been successfully deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rancher UI Storage/PVCs list for the 'staging' namespace (or via 'kubectl get pvc -n staging'), the 'data-vol' PVC is no longer present.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'legacy-config' ConfigMap in the 'staging' namespace has been successfully deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rancher UI ConfigMaps list for the 'staging' namespace (or via 'kubectl get cm -n staging'), the 'legacy-config' ConfigMap is no longer present.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'orphaned-svc' Service in the 'staging' namespace has been successfully deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rancher UI Services list for the 'staging' namespace (or via 'kubectl get svc -n staging'), the 'orphaned-svc' Service is no longer present.

task_completion.description: Verify that the healthy workloads ('nginx-web' and 'redis-primary') in the 'staging' namespace were not damaged or deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the 'staging' namespace workloads/pods show 'nginx-web' and 'redis-primary' are still present, active, and healthy.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually interacted with the Kubernetes cluster via Rancher UI or kubectl.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show genuine navigation and interaction within the Rancher web interface or valid kubectl commands executed in a terminal, not just a text editor with typed out expected results.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not simply delete and recreate the entire 'staging' namespace to clear the resources.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'staging' namespace remains intact throughout the trajectory, and the agent specifically targets the finalizers of the individual stuck resources.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the disappearance of resources.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) being used to manually delete HTML nodes from the Rancher UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target namespaces are 'old-project' and 'staging'. The resources stuck in the 'Terminating' state due to finalizers (e.g., 'custom.io/cleanup-handler', 'legacy.io/config-finalizer') are the 'old-project' namespace itself, and the 'data-vol' PVC, 'legacy-config' ConfigMap, and 'orphaned-svc' Service in the 'staging' namespace. Healthy workloads that must be preserved in 'staging' are 'nginx-web' and 'redis-primary'.
